analysis.summary: The technician performed a comprehensive system health check and optimization, investigating network activity, disabling unnecessary Windows services (WebClient and Windows Search), performing a disk cleanup, reviewing system logs and performance metrics, and concluding with an internet speed test.
actions_taken: Ran `netstat -ano` in Command Prompt to inspect network connections.
Attempted to identify a process by PID using `tasklist /svc /fi "pid eq [PID]"` which was not found.
Reviewed network activity in Resource Monitor.
Performed a Disk Cleanup, including system files.
Checked Disk Defragmentation and Optimization status.
Reviewed Task Manager (Performance, Startup, and Details tabs).
Reviewed Event Viewer (System and Application logs).
Reviewed Device Manager via System Properties.
Performed an internet speed test using fast.com.
notable_events: Disabling 'WebClient' and 'Windows Search' services for system optimization.
Initial investigation of a transient PID (3692) using netstat and tasklist which quickly disappeared.

tech_performance.efficiency_notes: The technician worked very methodically and efficiently, moving directly to each diagnostic tool or configuration setting without hesitation. All actions were performed promptly and purposefully.
